{{Quote|In a show of Republic loyality, the small Mid Rim world of Leria Kerlsil announced the loosening of immigration laws to allow the influx of refugees. The planet, however, had an odd set of cultural restrictions on newcomers.|Extract from the HoloNet News|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Leria Kerlsil''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It allowed [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] settlement in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], but only by wealthy single men. At the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the planet had a population of 300,000. Leria Kerlsil was the only planet known to be home to [[Life-bearer]]s, also known as life-witches.

{{Planet-stub}}
